title: Technical Onboarding "Bootcamps"
description: Implement technical onboarding bootcamps with 30-60-90 day plans for new hires. Architect an onboarding process that enables new hires to contribute production code quickly while understanding system rationale.
objectives: Implement technical onboarding bootcamps with 30-60-90 day plans for new hires.
Architect an onboarding process that enables new hires to contribute production code quickly while understanding system rationale.
